allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); from utils.settings import Settings; c=Settings\(\); print\('base_url:', c.base_url\); print\('browser:', c.browser_type\); print\('headless:', c.browser_headless\); print\('implicit_wait:', c.implicit_wait\); print\('log_level:', c.log_level\); print\('OK - 配置加载成功'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); from utils.settings import Settings; from utils.driver_factory import create_driver; d=create_driver\(settings=Settings\(\)\); d.get\('https://www.saucedemo.com/'\); print\('Page title:', d.title\); d.quit\(\); print\('OK - 浏览器启动验证通过'\)")

Bash(python -c "import ast, pathlib; violations = []; [violations.append\(f'{f.name}:{child.lineno} method={node.name} inline \(By.XXX\)'\) for f in sorted\(pathlib.Path\('pages'\).glob\('*.py'\)\) if f.name != '__init__.py' for node in ast.walk\(ast.parse\(f.read_text\(encoding='utf-8'\)\)\) if isinstance\(node, ast.FunctionDef\) and not node.name.startswith\('__'\) and not node.name.startswith\('_build_locator'\) for child in ast.walk\(node\) if isinstance\(child, ast.Tuple\) and len\(child.elts\)==2 and isinstance\(child.elts[0], ast.Attribute\) and isinstance\(child.elts[0].value, ast.Name\) and child.elts[0].value.id=='By']; print\('PASS: 0 inline locators in business methods' if not violations else '\\n'.join\(violations\)\)")
